title: Eastern Stir Fry
description: Quick and easy stir fry dish with a blend of Eastern flavors. Serve with rice or noodles for a complete meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced bitter melon and cook until it starts to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped crispy fried onion and cook for another 2 minutes.
Add the Middle Eastern spice mix and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the Eastern soy sauce and stir to combine.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
